description: Model Context Protocol servers for Czech & EU government and business data — KYC/AML and due-diligence ready. ARES company registry, ČNB FX rates, ADIS VAT-payer status, ISIR insolvency, EU + OFAC sanctions screening, EU business registries (GB/SK/PL/NL/DE/FR), and real-estate auctions, plus a unified due-diligence aggregator with risk scoring and statutory-chain / UBO ownership analysis.
